actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Ever lasting theories are built on solid ground.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Bad theories are built on shifting sand.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory was built on shaky ground.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: His theory was built on shaky ground.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory collapsed under the weight of evidence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: His theory collapsed under the gravity of evidence.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: His theory was very weak, and it collapsed under pressure.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: His theory was very weak, and it collapsed under pressure.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Well researched theories will let you stand tall.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: The destructive winds of knowledge ripped apart his flimsy theory.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Scientific theories should be able to withstand all destructive forces.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We need to sturdy up our argument with some more evidence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We need to sturdy up our theory with some more evidence.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Logical theories let you rise above others.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Well established theories allow us to rise into the clouds.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: I think we should add another wing to the theory.

actions.text: I think we should add another wing to the theory.

actions.text: His scientific theory was made of steel.
